name: Tapioca Soup
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Pork stock [Chicken works just fine. S.C.]
1/2 cup Cooked or canned crab meat
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine the pork stock and tapioca. Bring to a boil.
2. Add minced or ground pork and chopped garlic, then stir until well combined.
3. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in fish sauce and cooked or canned crab meat. Mix until incorporated.
5. Season with pepper to taste.
6. Serve hot and enjoy!
